title: Mezzo Series Gas Fireplace (AU/NZ) | Heat & Glo
description: Mezzo Series for AU/NZ: contemporary linear gas fireplace engineered to Australian and New Zealand gas standards. AS/NZS 5263. Available through AGA-certified dealers.

hero.eyebrow: MEZZO SERIES — AU/NZ LINEAR GAS FIREPLACE
hero.h1: The Mezzo linear, recompiled for AU/NZ regulations.
hero.lede: The Mezzo Series for Australia and New Zealand carries the same contemporary linear design language as Heat & Glo's US Mezzo, recompiled to meet AS/NZS 5263 gas standards and serviced through the regional AGA-certified dealer network.
